text:
Created attachment 185782
Proposed patch (since 446995 revision)

Patch to update editors/focuswriter port from 1.6.6 to 1.6.7 version.

Look following links for changes:
https://github.com/gottcode/focuswriter/compare/v1.6.6...v1.6.7
https://github.com/gottcode/focuswriter/blob/v1.6.7/NEWS#L1-L6

The build was tested on FreeBSD 10.3 amd64.
